MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
G. Jeff Coons of GORDON & REES (415-986-5900), appearing for defendant / moving party Hennessy Industries Inc.
James P. Nevin of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Jeanette Parrish

RULING:
DEFENDANT HENNESSY INDUSTRIES, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.'s motion to continue trial is granted. Defendant demonstrated good cause for a continuance pursuant to CRC 3.1332. The trial date is continued to April 8, 2013 at 11:15am in Department 503. This case is severed from Brayton Group 613. The new trial date serves as the initial trial date for discovery purposes as it relates to Hennessy Industries only. The October 9, 2012 trial date dictates discovery related to all other defendants. Plaintiff's request to have the trial date be continued as to Hennessy Industries only and to maintain the October 9 trial date as to all other defendants is denied. The trial date is continued as to all parties. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kim Richardson of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 5915 (503/TLJ)
